title: Names of Regular Expressions Named Groups Should be Used
description: Prefer using named groups in regular expressions to improve readability and maintainability.
message: Names of regular expressions named groups should be used.
recommendation: Use named groups in regular expressions when possible.

noncompliant.description: Named groups used in regular expression.

why_is_this_an_issue: Named groups improve readability and maintainability of regular expressions by providing descriptive names for captured groups.
how_to_fix: Update regular expressions to use named groups when possible.
function_code:
def check_named_group(node):
    return 'named_group' in node['value'] and node['value'].count('(?P<') < node['value'].count('(\w+|\(')

metadata.title: Names of Regular Expressions Named Groups Should be Used
